zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Baudement於1098年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特時，他的父親André de Baudemont53歲，母親Agnes23歲。他和Alix至少有1個女兒。他去世於1144年在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Baudement was born in 1098, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, André de Baudemont, was 53 and his mother, Agnes, was 23. He had at least 1 daughter with Alix. He died in 1144, in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Baudement est né en 1098, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, André de Baudemont, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Alix. Il est décédé en 1144, à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Baudement 1098 in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater André de Baudemont 53 und seine Mutter Agnes 23. Er hatte mit Alix mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1144 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Baudement è nato il nel 1098 nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, André de Baudemont, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Alix. Morì nel 1144, nel Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Baudementが1098年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで生まれた時，父André de Baudemontは53歳，母Agnesは23歳であった。彼はAlixとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1144年にフランスピカーディエイスンブレアインで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Baudement(이)가 1098년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 André de Baudemont(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Alix(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1144년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Baudement nasceu em 1098, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, André de Baudemont, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Alix. Ele faleceu em 1144, em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Baudement родился в 1098 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени André de Baudemont было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 23. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Alix. Он умер в 1144 г. в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Baudement nació en 1098, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, André de Baudemont, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Alix. Murió en 1144, en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 46 años.
